title: Ereo's Pack
description: The not-so greatest tweaks to vanilla and GUI modification made by Ereo.
body:
This is Ereo's Resource Pack he uses in his videos. This pack modifies the vanilla textures a very tiny bit to get an appeal to what Ereo likes. Also, it modifies the water biome color to match Bedrock Edition. Along with that, it adds a custom dark mode and adds GUI compatibility with mods like Bedrockify, Inventory Tabs, and Simple Voice Chat.

### All Changes Made to Blocks and Items
![All Block/item Changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74635e1fe92e3e3726beeefa73eff3ab88c839fc.png)
### GUI Preview
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jZXGMMrke-Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Mods Compatible:
```
Bedrockify
Inventory Tabs (updated)
Simple Voice Chat
Fabric API
Cloth Config
Colormatic
```
# Credit:
This is a combination of texteres from others and some from myself. You can put this in any pack you want, but make sure you credit me in the **credits.txt** file in your own pack.
